setupPage.title: Provisa Setup
setupPage.singleTenantDesc: One organization. All users share a single workspace.
setupPage.multiTenantDesc: Multiple organizations with isolated access. Users are assigned to orgs via invite links.
setupPage.simpleDomainDesc: All tables live in a single domain. Simplest model.
setupPage.namespacedDomainDesc: Tables are organized into multiple named domains.
setupPage.legacyDomainDesc: Leave the domain policy unset and decide later.
setupPage.basicAuthDesc: Username and password stored in Provisa. Self-service registration or invite-based.
setupPage.firebaseDesc: Sign in with Google via Firebase Authentication. Requires Firebase project configuration.
setupPage.noneDesc: All users have full access. Suitable for local development only.
